feature_title: Plan - API Call Optimization Reduction Pass

companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Plan - API Call Optimization Reduction Pass

## Document Status

- Last updated: 2026-02-20
- Feature: API call optimization and reduction
- Scope: Reduce redundant frontend API requests and expensive repeated backend metadata reads without changing user-facing behavior
- Planning maturity: `Spec Outline` complete, `Refined Spec` complete, `Detailed Implementation Plan` complete
- Implementation approval: Requested by user (2026-02-20)
- Implementation status: Complete (2026-02-20)

## User Goals Captured

1. Reduce unnecessary API calls across the app.
2. Improve responsiveness in API-heavy user interactions.
3. Preserve existing functionality while tightening request behavior.

## Spec Outline

1. Identify bursty/duplicate call paths in frontend API usage.
2. Add safe request dedupe where identical idempotent requests overlap.
3. Reduce backend expensive repeat work for stable per-track metadata lookups.
4. Validate with targeted tests and linting.

## Refined Spec

1. Implement frontend GET in-flight dedupe at the API client layer.
2. Tune polling-style hooks to avoid redundant focus-triggered refetches when interval polling is already active.
3. Add backend in-memory cache for `/library/tracks/:id/audio-info` keyed by stable file identity.
4. Keep API contracts and payload shapes unchanged.

## Detailed Implementation Plan (Atomic Tasks)

### Task 1: Frontend request dedupe
- Status: Complete
- Acceptance criteria:
  - Identical concurrent GET requests are deduped in `frontend/lib/api.ts`.
  - Behavior is unchanged for non-idempotent methods.
  - Completed:
    - Added API-client in-flight GET dedupe keyed by endpoint/token/timeout.
    - Retried requests bypass dedupe to avoid recursive self-joins.

### Task 2: Polling query tightening
- Status: Complete
- Acceptance criteria:
  - Polling queries avoid redundant refetches caused by focus/reconnect churn where safe.
  - Existing polling cadence and data semantics remain intact.
  - Completed:
    - Added `staleTime` + disabled focus/reconnect refetch for social and notification polling hooks/components.
    - Increased track-preference query `staleTime` to reduce repeat fetches on frequent remounts.

### Task 3: Backend audio-info caching
- Status: Complete
- Acceptance criteria:
  - `/library/tracks/:id/audio-info` uses bounded/TTL cache keyed by file identity.
  - Returned payload remains unchanged.
  - Completed:
    - Added bounded in-memory cache for audio metadata reads with 10-minute TTL.
    - Added stable cache key using `trackId + filePath + fileModified`.
    - Added regression test verifying repeated requests reuse cached metadata.

### Task 4: Verification and close-out
- Status: Complete
- Acceptance criteria:
  - Targeted backend tests pass.
  - Targeted frontend tests/lint pass for touched areas.
  - `npm run agent:preflight` passes.
  - Completed:
    - Backend runtime tests pass for library routes.
    - Frontend component tests pass for touched UI surfaces.
    - Frontend lint run completed for touched files (warnings only; no errors).
    - Preflight passes after route-map regeneration.

## Verification Evidence

- `npm --prefix backend test -- src/routes/__tests__/libraryRuntime.test.ts` (pass)
- `npm --prefix frontend run lint -- lib/api.ts hooks/useSocialPresence.ts hooks/useNotifications.ts components/activity/NotificationsTab.tsx hooks/useTrackPreference.ts` (warnings only, no errors)
- `npm --prefix frontend run test:component -- tests/component/socialTab.component.test.ts tests/component/sidebar.component.test.ts tests/component/trackPreferenceButtons.component.test.ts` (pass)
- `npm run agent:preflight` (pass)
